# BP-149 negative: the error branch includes the error attribute.
lang: go
file: BP-149-safe.go
variant: slog-error-attribute
---
package service

import "log/slog"

func load() error {
	err := doLoad()
	if err != nil {
		slog.Error("load failed", "err", err)
	}
	return nil
}

func doLoad() error { return nil }
